bead.title: ddx home: route cmd/config/git state paths through ddxroot
bead.description:
PROBLEM
The exact `.ddx` audit still matches the CLI command layer and config/git helpers, so convention-root projects keep bypassing `ddxroot.Path` in the entrypoints that create stores, read config, and resolve workspaces.

ROOT CAUSE
Representative call sites still hardcode `filepath.Join(..., ".ddx", ...)` in `cli/cmd/execute_loop_shared.go:154`, `cli/cmd/config.go:246`, `cli/cmd/try.go:150`, `cli/internal/config/loader.go:69`, and `cli/internal/git/git.go:107`. Those joins assume an in-tree `.ddx/` and prevent the command/config layer from following the new presence-based root resolution.

PROPOSED FIX
- Add shared helpers in `cli/cmd/` and `cli/internal/config/` that route project-state lookups through `ddxroot.Path` instead of direct `filepath.Join(..., ".ddx", ...)` calls.
- Replace the remaining direct `.ddx` joins in `cli/cmd/*.go`, `cli/internal/config/*.go`, and `cli/internal/git/git.go`.
- Add focused tests proving command/config lookup uses the resolved DDx root for convention-mode projects.

NON-SCOPE
- `cli/internal/agent`, `cli/internal/exec`, and server/graphql packages.
- Test-only files and the final full-tree hook gate.

DEPS
- No deps.
bead.acceptance:
1. `TestCommandStatePathsUseDDxRoot` proves CLI command helpers resolve project state through `ddxroot.Path` for a convention-root project.
2. `TestLoadWithWorkingDir_ConventionRoot` proves config lookup reads the resolved DDx root instead of joining `workingDir/.ddx` directly.
3. `rg 'filepath\.Join\([^)]*"\.ddx"' cli/cmd cli/internal/config cli/internal/git --type go | grep -v '^cli/internal/ddxroot/'` returns zero hits.
4. `cd cli && go test ./cmd/... ./internal/config/... ./internal/git/...` passes.
5. `lefthook run pre-commit` passes.
